overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay from a science fiction game depicting an astronaut character standing inside a space station observation module. The character observes exterior station structures and rocky planetary surfaces through large windows as the camera slowly pans left, transitioning from bright sunlit views to darker shadowed areas of the station.

scene_state.functional_zone: space station observation deck with sunlit exterior view

agents.ego_description: standing stationary at the observation window looking out at sunlit space station structures and rocky planetary surface

entered.detail: large panoramic window revealing space exterior with metal frame supports
large industrial crane-like structure extending outside the station
sunlit rocky terrain of asteroid or planetary surface below the station
reflective metal flooring with teal ambient lighting inside the station
structural metal beams framing the left side of the observation window

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of an astronaut character standing inside a space station observation deck. Through a large panoramic window, bright sunlight illuminates exterior station structures including a prominent gantry crane and rocky planetary terrain below. The interior features reflective metal flooring and teal ambient lighting while the camera begins a slow leftward pan.

scene_state.functional_zone: shadowed space station observation deck with complex exterior scaffolding

events.description: exterior view transitions from bright sunlight to deep shadow as the camera pans into a shaded section of the station
view reveals additional station scaffolding and structural modules in the shadowed distance

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe the exterior station structures as the lighting dims significantly and the view shifts to shadowed areas

entered.detail: complex network of metal scaffolding and structural supports extending into space
rocky planetary surface now cast in deep shadow with minimal illumination

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning left, the scene transitions into a shadowed section of the station where exterior lighting dims dramatically. The view shifts to reveal complex scaffolding structures on the left while the original gantry moves toward the right edge of the frame. The interior becomes dominated by teal artificial lighting as the sunlit terrain disappears from view, replaced by shadowed rocky formations and distant station modules.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera pan across a space station observation deck that transitions from a bright, sun-drenched vista to a dim, shadowed industrial exterior. It begins with an astronaut standing on reflective metal flooring, looking through a panoramic window where intense sunlight illuminates a gantry crane and rocky planetary terrain. As the camera slowly glides to the left, the brilliant light fades and the scene shifts into a shadowed section of the station. The view then expands to reveal complex scaffolding and distant station modules, while the sunlit landscape disappears and the interior is dominated by teal ambient lighting.
